about.heroTitle: Transforming Agricultural Waste into Sustainable & High-Value Resources
about.heroSubtitle: An integrated AI-powered platform connecting farmers, processors, and businesses to achieve zero-waste agriculture and boost local farmer prosperity.

visionMission.visionDesc: To become Indonesia's leading AI-powered agricultural circular economy ecosystem, pioneering zero-waste farming and global competitiveness.
visionMission.missionDesc: Empowering local farmers through artificial intelligence, transparent circular market access, and sustainability education for a greener food future.

pillars.title: Four Pillars of the UTU Ecosystem
pillars.subtitle: Integrated technology innovations to optimize waste potential from farmland to high-value bio-products.
pillars.analyzerDesc: Automated visual detection of waste types, physical states, and market value estimations using Computer Vision AI.
pillars.marketplaceDesc: Direct B2B & B2C marketplace for trading raw waste, processed items (compost, briquettes), and farming machinery.
pillars.loopiDesc: Smart 24/7 virtual agronomy assistant ready to answer technical waste processing and crop health questions.
pillars.jejakDesc: Avoided CO2 emissions tracker and precision fertilizer dosage recommendation calculator.

values.title: Core Values
values.v1Desc: Integrating cutting-edge AI technologies with green agronomy principles.
values.v2Desc: Providing accurate market valuation to ensure fair returns for farmers.
values.v3Desc: Focusing on concrete figures for carbon reduction and farmer income growth.
values.v4Desc: Uniting farmers, industry, academia, and government in one supply chain.

timeline.title: Our Journey & Growth
timeline.t1Desc: Development of initial AI vision algorithms for local agricultural waste classification.
timeline.t2Desc: Field testing with 10+ local Farmer Cooperatives (Gapoktan) in West Java.
timeline.t3Desc: Launch of unified circular marketplace, Loopi AI assistant, and national expansion.

cta.title: Join the Circular Economy Revolution
cta.subtitle: Explore agricultural waste trade or analyze your waste potential now.
